medical_history.chief_complaint: Persistent fever, maculopapular rash, splenomegaly, lymphadenopathy, and inflammatory syndrome
medical_history.history_of_present_illness: Initial echocardiography (after 8 days of fever) was normal. SoJIA was suspected, and the patient was treated with nonsteroidal anti-inflammatory drugs, but the fever persisted, and her clinical condition deteriorated. All microbiological studies were negative. Three intravenous (IV) boluses of 30 mg/kg methylprednisolone were administered for the first 3 days, followed by 1 mg/kg/day IV methylprednisolone, but clinical and inflammatory parameters remained unchanged. Fifteen days after the onset of fever, the patient’s clinical condition suddenly worsened, and she was admitted to the intensive care unit due to tachycardia (130 beats/min), tachypnea (35 cycles/min), shortness of breath, oxygen saturation at 93% with orthopnea, increased chest pain when lying down, decreased heart sounds, right shoulder pain, and pulsus paradoxus 15 mm Hg.

physical_examination.general_examination: Tachycardia (130 beats/min), tachypnea (35 cycles/min), oxygen saturation at 93%, pulsus paradoxus 15 mm Hg. No pericardial friction rub.
physical_examination.specialty_examination: Chest X-rays showed cardiomegaly and pulmonary congestion with mild bilateral pleural effusions. Electrocardiogram showed sinus tachycardia without ST-T wave changes. Echocardiograms demonstrated a 21 mm thick circumferential pericardial effusion, and left ventricular ejection fraction was 84%.

laboratory_examinations.changes_over_time: Increased to 301 mg/l after 15 days of fever
Increased to 33 mm/h after 15 days of fever

laboratory_examinations.procedure_name: Biological tests for macrophage activation syndrome

radiographic_examinations.changes_over_time: After 15 days of fever, showed a 21 mm thick circumferential pericardial effusion, left ventricular ejection fraction was 84%

radiographic_examinations.findings: Cardiomegaly and pulmonary congestion with mild bilateral pleural effusions
radiographic_examinations.changes_over_time: After 3 days on anakinra, showed improvement (enlarged 'water-bottle' cardiac silhouette resolved)

other_tests.findings: Sinus tachycardia without ST-T wave changes
